---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? What's frustrating or missing today?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature or improvement you'd like to see.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative solutions or workarounds?

## Design Phase

If this relates to the project roadmap, which phase does it fall under?

- [ ] Phase 1 — Core (Plant Inventory, Journal, Tasks, Search, Export)
- [ ] Phase 2 — Growth (Seasons, Calendar, Garden Map, Weather, Task Rules)
- [ ] Phase 3 — Intelligence (Year-over-year, Companion Planting, Cloud Sync)
- [ ] New / not in current roadmap

## Additional Context

Any mockups, examples from other apps, or further context.
